role: Root directory of the ArchSpine mirror system project, containing a visual architectural illustration and a demo project source code.
responsibility: Provides a high-level overview of the system architecture via the demo.gif illustration, and includes an intentionally flawed demo project (examples/demo-project/src) that demonstrates a user management flow with architectural violations for testing the mirror system's capability to detect and report such flaws.

children.role: Visual architectural illustration for the ArchSpine mirror system
Source code directory of a demo project for the ArchSpine mirror system, containing API, domain, and infrastructure layers for user management.
